allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "=== TEST 2: PIN INCORRECTO ==="; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/pin" -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"userId":"af42f328-7a00-4d07-8a1e-7c94ddf9c2f8","pin":"9999","warehouseId":"40339398-604c-4826-988b-147519a370da"}' } catch { "HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\): $\(\($_.ErrorDetails.Message | ConvertFrom-Json\).error\)" }; Write-Host "`n=== TEST 3: PIN NO NUMERICO ==="; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/pin" -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"userId":"af42f328-7a00-4d07-8a1e-7c94ddf9c2f8","pin":"abcd","warehouseId":"40339398-604c-4826-988b-147519a370da"}' } catch { "HTTP $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\): $\(\($_.ErrorDetails.Message | ConvertFrom-Json\).error\)" })
